title: DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS REENTRY YAMHILL COUNTY DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of personal care items such as shampoo, soap, toothpaste, toilet paper, deodorant, and feminine hygiene products. Also accepts financial donations. 28380 NE Wilsonville Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or email for more information or donation drop off time FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
